game.title: Cave of Past Sorrows
game.short_text: YOU create the Bullet Hell in this time loop-based game!

details.title: Cave of Past Sorrows
details.description:
Winner of the 8th Black and White game jam! Thanks, everyone!
Fight alongside your past in this loop-based bullet hell!
Cave of Past Sorrow is a fast-paced bullet hell where you need to shoot enemies, loop back, and shoot more enemies while avoiding the bullets of your previous selves.
This makes each bullet a blessing and a curse, and mastering the game means knowing when and when not to shoot.
(Experiencing issues? Poor framerate? Download the Standalone version below and you'll have a much better time!)
No one returns from the Cave of Past Sorrows, but maybe you can die at peace with this past.

AD/QD - MOVE
SPACE - JUMP
SPACE (MID-AIR) - DOUBLE JUMP
S - DROP FROM A PLATFORM
LEFT CLICK - SHOOT

You start in a small arena with a gun, and an enemy spawning near you. Shooting or avoiding it might be a good idea.
Every 10 seconds, a new loop starts, spawning new enemies, but also creating ghosts of every living creature, and repeating their actions from the previous loops. That includes yourself!
Your bullets are bouncy, which means they can kill you.
You can also die to the bullets of your past ghosts, so you should probably try to limit your shooting as much as you can.
Every two loops, the room will extend, giving you more space to run around and more platforms to jump on.
You unlock a new colour palette for every new loop you reach. You can swap the palette in the main menu.
Each enemy type has different behaviour and works with the loops in different ways...


Monsters: 
Don't die at the end of the loop.
Will move towards you trying to eat your soul.

Spikies:
Die at the end of the loop
Will shoot bullets around them, and more bullets if they are still alive towards the end of the loop.

Memories:
You will hate them.
Die at the end of the loop.
Will teleport to one of your ghosts, targeting it with a laser and killing it after a short delay.
Every time they kill a ghost, they will shoot bullets toward the player. The more ghosts they kill, the more bullets they shoot.
Will also shoot bullets toward the player when killed.
You really will hate them.

Programming, Art and Audio by jijigri.
Created for the Black and White Jam #8.
Engine: Unity
Pixel Art: Aseprite
Music: FL Studio
Sound Effects: BFXR
This one rewind sound I might have used too much: Zapsplat
Hundred of thanks to you for playing the game! I really hope you're enjoying it.
If you read that far, let me challenge you. Try and get to loop 15 and you will be crowned king/queen of Cave of Past Sorrows! (I would also be seriously impressed).
Thanks again!

game.title: "ring buffer" (b&w jam 8 submission)
game.short_text: Robot fights other robots... until one of them runs out of health. pretty much.

details.title: "ring buffer" (b&w jam 8 submission)
details.description:
Submission for black and white jam No 8 (Theme: `Loop`)
You, a robot with memory issues, fight against the horde of other robots that looks identical to you.
How to play:
you specify how your robot fights, by assigning action into a Ring buffer.as the name suggests, this buffer is a looped structure, and robots will repeat the exact sequence of action specified in the buffer until one of you fall.each time you "Lock in" after you insert your action, the game will literally lock your action in, unable to remove in the future.you also have 3 chances to reset a buffer completely.
carefully form your plan, prepare for any possible situation, and fight against the horde of enemies without getting it 5 times!

game.title: LoopDog
game.short_text: Bite your tail and become the Loopdog!

details.title: LoopDog
details.description:
Welcome to LoopDog!
A game where you play as a dog that's trying to bite its own tail! *monch*

Controls
This game was designed to be played on mobile devices so I'm sure you'll find it more comfortable to use your mouse as if it was your finger. This is the recommended way of experiencing the game, but if you still want to use your keyboard, then please continue reading.

The controls are explained inside the game, but basically:

[WASD/Arrow Keys/Mouse Swipe] = Movement

[R] = Restart Level

[M] = Go to Main Menu 

[N] = Go to Next Level 

[T] = Toggle Camera View
More about LoopDog
This game was created as an entry to the Black and White Jam 8. I challenged myself to design a game for mobile devices with support for WebGL; in the future, this game will have links to the App Store and Play Store so you can continue Looping on the go!
I don't intend to make LoopDog a full-fledged game. It was more of a neat little experiment for me to try out the challenges of deploying for more than one platform (believe me, it was an interesting ride!) and have something that's easy to play and accessible to everyone.
I hope you enjoy my game and have as much fun playing LoopDog as I had creating it for you!
Mobile Store Links
Once the game becomes available on the Play Store and App Store, I'll make sure to put the links here :)

game.short_text: Three heroes go on a quest to bring back the world's color.

details.title: EMIMLIVE: Chroma Quest (DEMO)
details.description:
Description:
EMIMLIVE: Chroma Quest is a turn-based RPG in a world turned black and white. Control a full-bodied wrestler, a (mad?) scientist, and a guy with an oversized boomerang as you explore the game's world and fight baddies along the way. Invert the colors of the game in-battle to change the heroes' classes on the fly (and find hidden objects while exploring).
(This is a Pre-Alpha demo, so a lot is subject to change going forward. Please look forward to updates on the project in the future.)
(Originally made in 11 days for the Black and White Jam #8. The theme was "Loop".)
*Check the Controls screen in-game for a list of controls1. Download and run the setup file
2. Follow the instructions to complete the installation process
3. Run "EMIMLIVE Chroma Quest (DEMO)" to start the game
(Designed for 1920x1080p screens)

game.title: Inconceivable Detective Madness
game.short_text: Solve the case in this 40s Rougelike!

details.title: Inconceivable Detective Madness
details.description:
-Pitch-
You are a private investigator, usually found daydreaming in your office. You have a unique ability: a justice curse that prevents you from running away from a case. When you get offered a case you get trapped by your justice curse and you're thrown in a loop to resolve the case. Over the time you got tired from this curse and developed a very peculiar way of solving cases: you punch every witness/clue in the face until they surrender to you! It doesn't really matter cause you're in a fake reality made by your curse. Once you get to the bottom of the case you're free to leave the dream!

game.title: Thieving Hexe
game.short_text: A Challenging Roguelite made for the Black and White Jam #8

details.title: Thieving Hexe
details.description:
Overview:
Thieving Hexe is an infinite survival roguelite where you have to traverse castles filled with hostile skeletons, find loot and steal a valuable fragment from deep within. Then, make a run for it and go through the level in reverse under a time limit to get away.
The levels get longer and more complicated as you progress - You are rewarded for remembering your way back and managing your resources.
Controls:
WASD: Move around
Left Shift: Dash
1-5 or Mouse scroll wheel: Cycle inventory slots
Q: Drop item
E: Interact
Left click: Attack/Use held item
Escape: Pause
Credits:
Lazy Duchess - Programming, Art, UI
KoryBagel - Environment and texture art
CurtisSmithSound - Audio design and implementation
Daniel Tu/lilcjttu - SFX
Tips:
You can take torches off walls with E. You can attack with them and even drop them to make a path and find your way back to the starting room. Get to know the level before stealing the fragment and starting the countdown.
Keep moving and try to maneuver around the skeletons as much as possible. They're faster than you, but turning and getting hit can throw them off.
Manage your potions and keep an eye on your health - Your state transfers between levels.
If you're not finding any enemies, you're likely heading into a dead end.
You can sometimes find a Castle Key item that you can use to open closed doors and potentially find more loot.

Engine anti-aliasing is present in UI elements for clearer icons and text.

game.title: Dr. Pig's Daily Constitutionals
game.short_text: Dodge rowdy rocks and chat up chittering critters as you stroll with Dr. Pig!

details.title: Dr. Pig's Daily Constitutionals
details.description:
Dr. Pig knows it's healthy to keep active! But the neighborhood sure is in a ruckus today!
Navigate the angry rocks while completing your loop before you need to take your nap (it's important to maintain a healthy sleep schedule!)
The game's difficulty (# of enemies, # of obstacles, and rock speed) increases as you complete more loops - and the dialog changes each time too! So take some time, relax to the music, and just enjoy slowing down for a bit!
Controls: 
WASD/Arrow Keys -  Move
Left Shift  - Interact (Talk to creatures, check objects, go to sleep)
Spacebar - Dash
Esc - Menu

Sound hand sounded by @octaddust & @leftturnonly

game.title: GBVR - Virtual Trader
game.short_text: A 1bit gameboy game

details.title: GBVR - Virtual Trader
details.description:
It is the year 1999, and a revolutionary technology has just been released - the third party Gameboy Color VR. Simply plug in your Headset and get whisked away to another world.This release comes with a .pocket version, as well as a ROM for the Gameboy Color. You can also play it in the browser!Navigate around the free-roam loop of VR and trade with the people you meet. Complete the cycle and return to reality! Explore the infinite loop and remember the locations to navigate and find yourself the most optimal path.WARNING, THE GAMEBOY COLOR VR HEADSET IS AN EXPERIMENTAL TECHNOLOGY AND PROLONGED USE MAY RESULT IN OVERHEATING (for this reason, it automatically shuts down when it becomes too hot).Controls:
GameboyKeyboardInteractAZCancel, speed textBXShow InventoryStartEnterView MapSelectShiftMovementD-padArrows/WASD

details.title: The Lair of Nekro Neko
details.description:
Game made for Black and White Jam #8 (Theme: Loop)
In this game you are Salem, a cat trapped in a time loop that will only be undone when he defeats the Machiavellian sorcerer Nekro Neko and saves his friends. For this, Salem will need to face evil creatures that increase his time inside the loop.
The more time he has, the more he will be able to explore the village and get more equipment to face the necromancer cat, but he will have to be careful as his time inside the loop is reduced when being attacked.

*Recommended with sounds on*
Controls:
Each player is controlled with a single key. Pick your key while in lobby. During the game pressing your key will make your player run while releasing it will make him stop. 
Rules:
Avoid being spot by the Eye and running into pits and try to make it to the end. Just to run one more lap...

game.title: Black & White Drift Racer
game.short_text: Be one with the drift! Race to complete faster and faster lap times while drifting in this competitive racer.

details.title: Black & White Drift Racer
details.description:
Listen to the Soundtrack
Use your skills as a drift racer to complete the fastest time on the track! You have a limited time to complete each lap before the track manager will get mad and end your run! Each consecutive lap completed will increase your overall speed and decrease the amount of time you have to keep racing! There are two cars you can select from in the main menu (easy and hard). 
*Tip: Hold the space bar to drift and try turning without the gas on! You can also turn sharper when you are moving slower.
Objective:
Complete as many laps as possible before getting kicked off the track

Controls
ButtonAlternative ButtonGame ControlWUp ArrowForward (Gas)Space BarNoneHand Brake (Drift)SDown ArrowSlow Down (Reverse)DRight ArrowSteer RightALeft ArrowSteer LeftPNonePauseRNoneRestart The TrackSDown ArrowSlow Down (Reverse)
*You can adjust the music and sound effect volume in the settings menu.

Other notes:
You can go back to the main menu or pause to see your high scores.
The harder car will go faster, but you will have less time to complete each lap!


Good luck and get to burnin that rubber!


All assets are original. This game was made for Black & White Jam #8 "Loop" in one week using Unity, Aseprite and Ableton.

game.title: Wordy Loops
game.short_text: Free Web Browser Word Game

details.title: Wordy Loops
details.description:
Welcome to Wordy Loops!  Loop words around to form new words on a 5x5 grid.Controls

Arrow KeysNavigateEnter KeyConfirm SelectionMouse and PointerMenu icons
Objective
Use a letter from each column to form a word across the top row, then replace a vertical word on the board with the word you just formed.  Repeat until time runs out.  Get as many words as you can to achieve a high score!
Credits
Created for Black & White Jam 8 using just black and white!  All assets including graphics and sound were created by alf0186.

game.title: Back Again
game.short_text: Explore The Past, Create A Future

details.title: Back Again
details.description:
Things are coming to an end. The food from the ground can no longer be eaten. The water from the river can no longer be drunk. The air can no longer be breathed. Whether humanity can no longer support the world we live in or the world can no longer support humanity is up for debate, but the fact is if humanity wants to survive, some thing must change.
The last-ditch effort of the ones left is in one machine, storing all of our history and simulating scenes from the past in near perfect accuracy. You must explore the past, aiming towards the beginning of human history as a whole to find a way to continue our existence.
Along the way, there will be pieces of the past, either artefacts of cultural significance or simply pieces of what used to be a common part of daily life. By reading them, you will understand how people of past thought and behaved, learning better to navigate and understand their spaces.
However, time is limited. Maybe it is your best bet to forgo time-consuming discoveries, instead choosing to push forward blindly towards the beginning, leaving chance to chance and fate to fate.  

Controls
WASD: MovementMouse or Arrow Keys: Look aroundR: Restart LevelEnter/Space: Skip Dialog ScrollEsc: Pause Game
(Open Options To Change Looking Input)

moreInfo.Authors: Bradley Jones, Hk2014, Three Raccoons, RyanHefford, SHVR
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Alternate History, Exploration, Historical, Isometric, maze, Retro, Story Rich, Time Travel

game.title: The Ouroboros Agency
game.short_text: Timeline Management Simulator

details.title: The Ouroboros Agency
details.description:
Welcome to the Ouroboros Agency.
Made for the Black and White game jam, this sandbox was made in 5 days.
Worked on it for maybe half the time I put aside for it, and had to cut many features such as:
Dialog system with the Skeleton and the Wheel.More idle behaviors for the environmental effects that are alive.Folders of Souls and the Soul-Sending Wheel mechanic.Some quiet music would have been nice, but I couldn't find any free ones online that fit.
Regardless, I hope it makes you smile! Thanks for playing.

moreInfo.Author: Wheeler
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Atmospheric, Black and White, Sandbox, Singleplayer

game.title: Bloop
game.short_text: A short puzzle game about completing a trains loop.

details.title: Bloop
details.description:
In Bloop, move the pieces into their correct positions to form a loop for the train. 

How to play:
Each piece has a number, this is how many moves the piece MUST make
Use the text input to move the pieces using the syntax "move <coordinate> <direction>" e.g  "move a1 up" then hit return (or enter) to enter your command.
The aim is to use every pieces amount of moves so that they end up in a horizontal line, ready for the train to pass: see the last screenshot for a visual of what you are aiming for!

Music: "Minimalistic Loops" by gooseninja:
https://gooseninja.itch.io/minimalistc-loopsDownload the zipped folder, extract it and then run the executable file

moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Pixel Art

game.title: Spiralcopter
game.short_text: Loop to Win!

details.title: Spiralcopter
details.description:
Dodge enemies, collect powerups, and fly around as you progress through this classic monochromatic arcade game.
Destroy enemies by looping around them and try to get the highest score!
The browser version is from the game jam and serves as a demo. If you like it, the full version is available for download. Have fun flying!

Made by McPepic for the Black & White Game JamDownload the .zip file
Right click and press extract all
Double click the executable in the newly created folder
To create a shortcut, right click the .exe, go to send to, and the option to create a shortcut on your desktop should appear.
